one_time_description: Cold Lake Air Weapons Range Settlement received in 2022 ($28,132,700), with $24,238,581 contributed to Membership Trust; remaining undistributed proceeds of $3,625,000 held in lawyers trust carried into 2023
economic_notes: Nation operates Birch Narrows Grocery and Gas Bar. Birch Narrows Dene Nation Development Limited Partnership is a wholly-owned GBE with total revenue of $413,115 and net loss of $281,663 in 2023. Capital projects in progress include road re-grading ($1,705,000 budget), solid waste transfer station ($1,806,800 budget), and tiny homes ($581,499 cumulative costs). Member of Meadow Lake Tribal Council (9 Nations).
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2023. Province is Saskatchewan. The Cold Lake Air Weapons Range Settlement ($28,132,700) was a one-time item received in FY2022; the Birch Narrows Dene Nation Membership Trust is NOT consolidated as it is controlled by independent trustees. The GBE (Birch Narrows Dene Nation Development Limited Partnership) is accounted for using modified equity method and not consolidated. Consolidated entities include: Birch Narrows Dene Nation, Birch Ridge Educational Authority, Birch Narrows Dene Nation CMHC Housing Fund, and Birch Narrows Grocery and Gas Bar. Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($7,199,538) + MLTC Program Services ($3,225,304) + Meadow Lake Health & Social Dev Authority ($2,936,188) + MLTC Child & Family Services ($681,613) + CMHC Subsidy ($257,831) + Northern Lights School Division ($704,165) + First Nations Trust ($325,222) = $15,330,861; however MLTC Dividends ($1,477,778) and First Nations Trust may be partially OSR — total_government_transfers set to exclude dividends and include identified transfer sources. New accounting standards PS 3280 and PS 3450 adopted April 1, 2022 prospectively with no material impact.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
